title: ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to adults with mental health disorders including outpatient services, individual, family, and group therapy, psychiatric assessments and supports and medication managements when appropriate. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults with mental health disorders such as mood disorders, anxiety, or trauma related issues Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 322-7500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 322-7500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DESCHUTES COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
